creator: brnrd@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 149047
Patch for mariab55-server and -client

That patch conflicted with mariadb55, sorry.
There's only mariadb mariadb55 and then mariadb100 (and next is mariadb101)
The mariadb-server -client ports match mariadb53 due to PKGNAMESUFFIX = to 53-server
